description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a rooftop terrace, surrounded by a low fence and a gated entry. The exterior features a combination of light and dark wall finishes, with large rectangular windows arranged in horizontal rows on both floors. The front yard is enclosed by a black metal fence and gate, and there is a small green lawn area adjacent to the house. The rooftop is accessible via an external staircase, and the terrace is bordered by metal railings for safety. The house has a clean, geometric design with minimal ornamentation, emphasizing straight lines and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, rooftop terrace, large windows, and a fenced yard with a gated entry.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main gate, fence, entryway, and prominent windows on both floors.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the external staircase to the rooftop and the green terrace area.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain wall, minimal windows, and the upper structure of the house visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows and the continuation of the fence and gate.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a metal gate, steps, and a small covered porch area, framed by a fence and minimal decorative elements.
